sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72976" key="o)ligarki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγ-αρκία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n72976.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contentment with little,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
